notes: Their main damage was Akeron (15k magical); 0/5 of you itemized magic resist — that hurt.
Enemy ran 2/5 on or near their meta core.
🎮 private (carry) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.
Willy Guggenheim (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.
You took Mini Prime in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.5s of lockdown): Howitzer Land Mine (knockback), Akeron Web Lash (root 1s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Enemy is 4/5 physical — a single armor item blunts most of their damage; itemize armor on anyone diveable.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
ourKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
ourKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
ourKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Slow Grenades / Land Mine zone → R2000 Missile → Make It Rain ult
enemyKits.winCondition: wall off space with mines/grenades and rain artillery on a held enemy
enemyKits.playWith: CC and chokes that force enemies into his zones
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile turret — flank his mine zones, dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
enemyKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
enemyKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

enemyKits.combo: Web Lash root → Crushing Maw armor shred → Hellfire eye → Consume pull-channel
enemyKits.winCondition: root with Web Lash and grind with Hunger-stacked haste
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst on his rooted target
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Web Lash — without the root he can't lock you; interrupt Consume

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
